title: Scope of term 'Cable' in S.No. 33 to Notification No. 91/89- Cus. -Circular No.52/1996-Customs, dated 24.10.1996
description: Scope of term 'Cable' in S.No. 33 to Notification No. 91/89- Cus. -Circular No.52/1996-Customs, dated 24.10.1996
alternate_descriptions: Scope of term 'Cable' in S.No. 33 to Notification No. 91/89- Cus. - Circular No.52/1996-Customs, dated 24.10.1996
text: Circular No. 52/96-Cus. dated 24/10/96 F.No. 528/78/96-Cus. (TU) Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue, New Delhi, Subject : Scope of term 'Cable' in S.No. 33 to Notification No. 91/89- Cus. - Regarding. I am directed to refer your letter No.S / 26 - Misc. - 323/96- VB dated 17 June, 1996 on the subject mentioned above and to say that S.No. 33 of Notification 91/89-Cus. dated 01/03/1998 (presently Sr. No. 22, List 9 to Notfn.No. 36/96-Cus dated 23.7.1996) would cover polarisation holding fibres, plastic fibres and large core fibres and also cables made from these fibres. Pending cases of assessment may kindly be finalised accordingly. Sd/- (V.K. Singh) Senior Technical Officer -- 1 of 1 --
